name: 2048Skill Edition
description: This is an exciting twist on the classic 2048 game! In this version, weve added new games and skills that elevate the experience to a whole new level. Players can now enjoy fresh challenges, unique game modes, and strategic skills that make gameplay more engaging and dynamic. Whether youre a longtime fan of 2048 or new to the game, these added features provide a fun and refreshing experience. Get ready to enjoy a completely different way to play 2048 and sharpen your puzzle-solving skills!
instructions: This game mainly controls the direction of the ball shot to eliminate the ball
